\tzpentry{ID5690}{Psi Entangled Rangle Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5690 introduces Psi Entangled Rangle Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$ |\textbackslash{}Psi\_\{entangled\}\textbackslash{}rangle=\textbackslash{}frac\{1\}\{\textbackslash{}sqrt\{2\}\}\textbackslash{}left(|L,R\textbackslash{}rangle+e\textasciicircum{}\{i\textbackslash{}phi\_\{ helix\}\}|R,L\textbackslash{}rangle\textbackslash{}right) \$
\]
